name: skin-base
title: Base skin (tunable, no concept)
description: Generic, concept-free skin with universal structural dials (border, bevel, elevation, blur, surface opacity, press) — neutral at default = stock shadcn, turn them up to add structure. Scoped to [data-skin="base"].
docs: 1) @import "./skins/base.css"; in your globals.css.  2) Set data-skin="base" on <html>.  3) Tune --ui-border/-bevel/-elevation/-blur/-surface/-press + --radius.
